hero.title: Get in Touch With the MIRYA Team
hero.description: Tell us what you’re looking for, and we’ll point you in the right direction. Fast, friendly, and tailored support always.

contactInfo.title: Get In Touch
contactInfo.description: Have questions or need help with your order? We're here to assist you every step of the way.

community.title: Community
community.description: Are you interested in one of our paid offerings? If yes, then reach out to our sales team for further queries and suggestions.

anythingElse.title: Anything Else
anythingElse.description: For any other queries and questions you can write us an email anywhere and from anywhere. Our support team will reach out to you quickly.
